title: Read Data Values from a JSON File Using Multiple Threads

criteria.description: Defines a function that accepts a list of file paths as a parameter
Uses Python's threading module to spawn one thread per file
Each thread independently reads and parses its assigned JSON file
Returns a dictionary mapping each file path to its parsed JSON content
Uses a thread-safe mechanism (e.g. Lock or thread-safe structure) when writing results
Handles missing files or invalid JSON gracefully per thread
